Hero.description: Technical leadership focused on scalability and clean code. I transform complex problems into efficient solutions using modern stacks, solid infrastructure management and powered by AI automation.

items.description: Leading the transition from legacy systems to modern React-based architectures. Implementing high-end immersive web experiences with Framer Motion and Three.js.
Developed and maintained highly scalable e-commerce platforms. Improved performance by 30% through caching optimization and lazy loading.
Designed and built custom portfolios and landing pages for creative agencies, focusing on accessibility, SEO and extreme web performance.

items.name: Project Vektor
items.description: A digital ecosystem built with React, Node.js and Framer Motion. This project redefines the standard interface by combining robust architecture with fluid micro-interactions and dark-mode aesthetics.

items.name: Aether API
items.description: High-performance backend service with comprehensive documentation. Integrating Redis caching and a scalable microservices approach.

items.name: Nexus UI
items.description: An open-source React component library focused on brutalist and dark themes. Highly customizable and built completely from scratch using CSS.
